name: Lemon Bread with Lemon Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 9x5 loaf pan for each loaf of bread you are making.
2. Combine sugar, milk, butter, and eggs in a large bowl; mix well.
3. Blend in flour, baking powder, salt, and grated lemon rind until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pans and bake 1 hour in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven.
5. Cool slightly, then remove from the pan and set on foil.
6. Prepare glaze: In a saucepan, combine sugar and lemon juice; stir over low heat until the sugar dissolves and the glaze is hot.
7. Pour the hot glaze slowly over the surface of the cooled bread. Let it cool completely before slicing.
8. To prepare Lemon Ice, in a saucepan, combine water and sugar; bring to a boil. Add grated lemon rind and simmer for 5 minutes. Cool, then add fresh lemon juice and stir.
9. Pour the liquid into freezer trays (2 per loaf of bread) and freeze until set but not hard.
10. Transfer to a food processor or blender and, if desired, fold in egg whites; beat until smooth.
11. Refreeze for about 3 hours or until firm.
12. When ready to serve, let stand for a few minutes before scooping out and serving bread slices with a scoop of lemon ice on the side.
